required_skills: Collect, clean, and preprocess structured and unstructured data
Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical analysis
Develop dashboards using Power BI, Tableau, or similar tools
Write optimized SQL queries to extract and analyze data
Generate reports and present findings to stakeholders
Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and compliance
missing_skills: Collect, clean, and preprocess structured and unstructured data
Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical analysis
Develop dashboards using Power BI, Tableau, or similar tools
Write optimized SQL queries to extract and analyze data
Generate reports and present findings to stakeholders
Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and compliance

level_2.title: Technical Questions
questions: What are the basic data types in Python?

level_3.title: Behavioral Questions
questions: Tell me about a time you had to make a difficult decision while working on SQL and how the result affected your team.

Tell me about a time you influenced a team decision without direct authority.

questions.question: Based on this candidate profile and role, which action best shows readiness in SQL?
options: Claim SQL is mostly handled automatically so deep understanding is unnecessary.
Say that SQL is important but avoid discussing any implementation details or outcomes.

Focus on unrelated tools and hope the interviewer infers knowledge of SQL.
